_codex_staging.notes: 3M Priority 6 official PDF source repair: 17/17 rows now point to official or official-vendor transcript PDFs; 0/17 remain StockAnalysis fallback with official_search_exhausted=true.

research_scope: FY Q1 2022 through FY Q1 2026 inclusive
source_policy_applied: Readable earnings-call transcript text is accepted; source classification is provenance, not a blocker. Third-party rows retain usage_caution.

coverage_summary.primary_structured_source: Official transcript PDFs where available; StockAnalysis fallback for unresolved quarters
coverage_summary.official_source_context: 3M official financials page exposes webcast_transcript PDFs for every in-scope quarter.
